meta.name: Akatsuki Boss Battles
meta.description: Multi-phase high-stakes missions representing major academic and life challenges. Each boss requires strategy, persistence, and milestone completion.
meta.designPhilosophy: Bosses should feel epic but achievable. Phases create momentum. Weak points reward strategy.

bosses.name: The Literature Hydra
bosses.lore: A multi-headed beast formed from endless PDFs, contradictory theories, and citation chaos. Each head represents a different theoretical school trying to pull you apart.

phases.title: Head of Overwhelm
phases.description: Tame the chaos by organizing sources
requiredSteps: Create or update your literature matrix
Sort 15-20 articles into conceptual categories
Identify 3 major theoretical threads

phases.title: Head of Contradiction
requiredSteps: Pick 3-4 conflicting articles on same topic
Write a memo explaining the contradiction
Identify which explanation is stronger and why
Note what methodology differences might explain the conflict

phases.title: Head of Synthesis
phases.description: Forge a unified narrative from scattered sources
requiredSteps: Write a 500-800 word synthesis
Connect theoretical threads into coherent argument
Define the gap your research fills
Create a visual concept map of the literature

phases.title: The Heart of Citation
phases.description: Final boss phase - perfect your citations
requiredSteps: Check every citation in your document
Verify all references are in your bibliography
Format according to style guide
Run a final proofread of all quotes

enrageTimer.effect: Hydra grows 2 new heads (adds 2 more required sources per phase)

bosses.victoryCondition: All 4 phases completed with synthesis document saved
bosses.failureCondition: Collecting more PDFs without integrating them
bosses.recoveryMission: Write a 5-bullet synthesis of one conceptual thread only

bosses.name: The Methodology Golem
bosses.lore: A towering stone guardian forged from paradigms, assumptions, and methodological debates. It blocks the path until your design is unshakeable.

phases.title: Foundation of Paradigms
requiredSteps: Write your paradigm in 3-5 sentences
Explain why it fits your research question
Identify one alternative paradigm and why you rejected it
Cite 2-3 key philosophers for your paradigm

phases.title: Design Core
phases.description: Choose and justify your research design
requiredSteps: Compare 3 possible research designs
Create a pros/cons table for each
Select the strongest one for your question
Write a 200-word justification paragraph

phases.title: Operationalization Chamber
phases.description: Define how you will measure and collect data
requiredSteps: Write your data collection protocol step by step
Define each variable and how it's measured
Create a data collection checklist
Pilot test your method on 1-2 cases

phases.title: The Ethics Seal
requiredSteps: Identify 3 potential ethical issues
Explain mitigation strategies for each
Draft informed consent language
Plan for data security and anonymity

phases.title: The Golem's Heart
phases.description: Final defense - write complete methodology section
requiredSteps: Write 1000-1500 word methodology section
Include paradigm, design, sampling, instruments, procedures, ethics
Add a limitations subsection
Save as 'Methodology_vFinal'

enrageTimer.effect: Golem gains stone armor (requires 2 additional citations per claim)

bosses.victoryCondition: Complete methodology section ready for advisor review
bosses.recoveryMission: Write a 5-bullet summary of your chosen design only

bosses.name: The Burnout Demon
bosses.lore: A towering demon formed from exhaustion, guilt, and overwork. It drains your energy and whispers that you're falling behind. This boss requires real-time recovery, not just productivity.

phases.title: Flame of Exhaustion
requiredSteps: Do a 5-minute grounding ritual
Drink 2 full glasses of water
Take 10 deep breaths
Eat a proper meal
Go to bed 1 hour earlier tonight

phases.title: Ashes of Guilt
requiredSteps: Write a 3-sentence self-compassion note
Identify one unrealistic expectation you placed on yourself
Replace it with a realistic, kinder expectation
Share your note with someone supportive (optional)

phases.title: Rekindling Ember
requiredSteps: Pick one stalled mission (any mission)
Define the smallest possible next step (under 2 minutes)
Do 2-5 minutes of progress
Stop immediately - do not push further
Log what you did

phases.title: The Demon's Bargain
requiredSteps: Review all active tasks
Identify 3 tasks you can drop or delegate
Set a daily work hour limit (e.g., 6 hours)
Schedule 2 blocks of rest today
Write your new boundaries down

phases.title: The Exorcism
phases.description: Complete one full mission without burnout
requiredSteps: Pick a Medium difficulty mission
Break it into 25-minute focused blocks
Take a 5-minute break after each block
Stop when you feel tired (not when finished)
Log your energy level before and after

enrageTimer.effect: Demon feeds on guilt (negative self-talk doubles)

bosses.victoryCondition: All 5 phases completed + energy stabilized for 3 consecutive days
bosses.recoveryMission: Do a 2-minute re-entry ritual and rest for 2 hours

bosses.name: The Deadline Reaper
bosses.lore: A cloaked figure carrying a scythe forged from overdue tasks and forgotten commitments. It grows stronger the longer you avoid it.

unlockCondition.description: Automatically appears when 5+ tasks are overdue

phases.title: Shadow of Avoidance
requiredSteps: List all overdue tasks (every single one)
Sort them by domain (PhD, Skool, etc.)
Mark which are still relevant vs. obsolete
Delete or archive obsolete tasks without guilt

phases.title: Scythe of Priorities
requiredSteps: From remaining tasks, pick top 3 priorities
Define micro-steps for each (under 10 min each)
Schedule them on your calendar
Communicate new deadlines to anyone waiting

phases.title: Reaper's Bargain
requiredSteps: Choose the highest-priority overdue mission
Do 20-30 minutes of focused progress
Do not try to finish - just make progress
Log what you accomplished
Schedule the next session

phases.title: The Final Harvest
requiredSteps: Complete all remaining overdue tasks
For each task, ask: 'Is this good enough?'
Submit/save/archive each one
Celebrate with a reward

bosses.victoryCondition: All overdue tasks completed or properly archived
bosses.recoveryMission: Do 5 minutes on any overdue task and stop

phaseLocking.description: Must complete phase N to unlock phase N+1

difficultyScaling.description: Each boss defeated increases next boss difficulty by 10%
